scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:sites: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && node hosting/build.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
